overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a gold futuristic convertible driving through a desert wasteland toward Night City. The vehicle transitions from dirt roads past abandoned industrial structures onto a paved coastal highway winding through rocky cliff formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert approach road with abandoned industrial structures

events.description: overtaking a maroon van on the left side of the dirt road
blue modified coupe appears on the right and drives parallel before moving ahead

agents.ego_description: driving a gold futuristic convertible at high speed on a desert dirt road toward the distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: blue modified coupe driving alongside and then overtaking on the right

entered.detail: large collapsed industrial building with dark metal framework and curved roof
tall skyscrapers with illuminated vertical accents visible in the hazy distance
wooden utility poles with suspended cables running parallel to the road
reddish-brown rock formations and sparse desert vegetation including joshua trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert dirt road with an abandoned mega-structure looming on the left. The camera follows a gold convertible speeding toward a distant futuristic city skyline. Power lines run parallel on the left while rocky desert terrain fills the right side. The vehicle overtakes a maroon van and is then passed by a blue modified coupe.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert road intersection with stop sign

events.description: vehicle slows and initiates a right turn at the stop sign intersection
transitioning from dirt road onto paved asphalt highway

agents.ego_description: slowing down to navigate a right turn at the stop sign onto the main paved highway

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign mounted on a pole at the intersection
freshly paved asphalt road with yellow double dividing lines

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a stop sign at a desert intersection and executes a right turn. The abandoned structure falls behind as the car transitions from the dirt path onto a paved highway. The road surface changes from brown earth to black asphalt with clear lane markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway carved into rocky desert cliffs

events.description: navigating a sharp left curve along the cliffside highway
passing a large elevated billboard structure on the right

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the winding paved highway with rocky cliffs on the right and distant city views on the left

entered.detail: metal safety barrier with horizontal rails along the cliff edge
large rectangular advertising structure elevated on metal supports

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the convertible along a winding paved highway carved into red rocky cliffs. The city skyline shifts to the left background while the terrain on the right becomes imposing cliff faces. The vehicle passes a large highway billboard and navigates several curves with guard rails protecting the cliff edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a gold convertible travels from a desolate desert wasteland toward the outskirts of a futuristic city. It begins on a wide dirt road where the vehicle speeds past an abandoned mega-structure and power lines, overtaking a maroon van before being passed by a blue modified coupe. As the car approaches a desert intersection, it executes a right turn, causing the abandoned structure to recede as the brown earth transitions into a paved black asphalt highway. The scene then shifts to a winding coastal route carved into red rocky cliffs, with the city skyline drifting into the left background. Finally, the camera follows the vehicle past a large highway billboard as it navigates several curves protected by guard rails along the imposing cliff edge.
